parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-opus-4-7',
  max_tokens: 600,
  system: 'You classify new Facebook Group members for The STR Ledger into one of four buyer personas based on their three entry-question answers. Use this rubric strictly:
- dreamer: not yet hosting, planning / researching / about to launch first listing
- sam: actively hosting exactly 1 listing (newer host, single property)
- sarah: actively hosting 3 or more listings (experienced host)
- pam: manages listings on behalf of others (co-host, property manager, agency)
For 2 listings, choose between sam and sarah based on context (lean sarah if they sound experienced).
Return STRICT JSON only — no markdown, no prose.',
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: 'Classify this new FB Group member into a persona.

Q1 Hosting status: ' + ($json.hosting_status || '(blank)') + '
Q2 Listing count: ' + ($json.listing_count_raw || '(blank)') + ' (parsed as number: ' + $json.listing_count_num + ')
Q3 Biggest headache: ' + ($json.headache || '(blank)') + '

Return STRICT JSON ONLY:
{
  "persona": "dreamer" | "sam" | "sarah" | "pam",
  "confidence": <0.0-1.0>,
  "reasoning": "<one short sentence>",
  "headache_tag": "<short slug summarizing their #1 headache, e.g. cleaning-coordination, pricing, taxes, guest-screening>"
}'
  }]
}) }}

nodes.name: Send FB DM via Graph API

value.Subject: ={{ 'FB Group: New ' + $json.persona + ' to DM (' + Math.round($json.confidence*100) + '% conf)' }}
value.Draft response: ={{ 'Send a manual welcome DM tailored to persona: ' + $json.persona }}

parameters.text:
={{ '👋 New FB Group member — ' + ($node['Parse Persona + Apply Rules'].json.full_name || $node['Parse Persona + Apply Rules'].json.fb_user_id) + '
Persona: ' + $node['Parse Persona + Apply Rules'].json.persona + ' (' + Math.round($node['Parse Persona + Apply Rules'].json.confidence * 100) + '% conf)
Listings: ' + $node['Parse Persona + Apply Rules'].json.listing_count_raw + ' | Headache: ' + $node['Parse Persona + Apply Rules'].json.headache_tag + '
DM: ' + ($node['Parse Persona + Apply Rules'].json.high_confidence ? 'auto-sent' : 'queued for manual review') }}

main.node: Send FB DM via Graph API
